raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 20,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tadeht ta yakra tas
Klings KUNGS: Raugi/Es
gribbu prett juhfeem Spilwe-
nceem/ ar ko juhs tahs Dwehfe-
les guhstat Pukku-Dahrsos/ un
norauſtiſchu tohs no juhsahm
Rohkahm/ un atiwabbinaſchu
tahs Dwehfeleg/ tahs Dwehfe-
leg/ ko juhs guhstat Pukku-
Dahrsos.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 21,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Es ſaptlohfifchnu arridsan
juhsus Pagalwn Spilwenus/
un atpeſtifchnu mannus Landis
no juhsu Rohkas/ ta ka teem
wairs ne buhs juhsu Rohka buht
var Meddijannu/ un juhs fajut-
tifeet/ ka es tas KUNGS eſmu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 22,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tadeht ka juhs to Sir-
di ta Taſfna zaur Wilttbu efkat
apbehdtinaſchi/ ko es ne eſmu
apbehdtinajs/ un efkat ta Bee-
deewiga Rohkas ſtiprinaſchi/ ka
tain ne bij atgreestees no fawa
nikna Zelka/ ka tas dſihwotu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 23,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tadeht juhs ne buhs
wairs aplamas Parahdifchanas
redſeht/ nedg fhledami fhleht/
bet es tſglahbfchn farws Landis
no juhsu Rohkas/ un juhs fa-
juttifeet/ ka es tas KUNGS
eſmu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Ta XIV. Modalla.
Eſekieſs fluddina/ Pa tas tik labbi/ teem bleh-
digeem : 1/3. Ka teem wiltigeem Prauee-
ſcheem fahffeeß: 9. Un ka tahdas Sohdibas ne
taps aiskawetas: 12. Jepſchu arri Nons/
Daniels un Ijabs preeſch teem luſgtu: 14.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "N pee man nahze lahdi
Wihti no Israëta Bez-
zajeem/ un aptehdahs
mannä Preefcha.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 2,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Lao noritee ra KU
Wahrds us man/ kas faztja-
"
    },
    {
      "n": 3,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tu Zilweka Behrns/ tc
Wihti irr jawus Suhdu-De
wns jawas Sirdi uszehluschi/ u
to Peedausifchanu jawu Nos-
guttu itt fiaht jawä Breefs-
likkuschi/ woj tad es no teem li
schobs jautateeß?
"
    },
    {
      "n": 4,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tadeht runna ar teem/
takki us teem: Ta fakka t
Klings KUNGS: Ifvee
Wihrs no Israëka Namma/ k
Suhdu-Deewus fan
Sirdi uszelf/ un to Peedau
ſebanu jawä Noseeguma fan
Breefscha leek/ un nahk pee
Praweeta/ tad Es tas KUN
atbildetchu winnam/kad tas na
pehz jawu Suhdu-Deewu Wa
ruma.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 5,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tadeht ka es tam Israë
Namman Sirdi grabbstu/
tee irr wiſti zaur faweem Su-
du-Deeweem no mannim atk-
pufchees.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 6,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tapehz fakki us to Isr-
ka Namnu: Ta fakka t
Klings KUNGS: Atgree-
tees/un nogreeseetees no juhfe-
Suhdu-Deeweem/ un nog-
feet juhsus Maiquß no wiffa-
juhtu Negantibahm.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 7,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Jo ikweens Zilweks no
fraëka Namna/ un no te
Gwetchineefeem/ kas Ifra-
Starpa dſihwo/ kas atpak-
no manntni atkahpjahs/ un i
zelf jawus Suhdu-Deewus
wa Sirdi/ un leek to Peeda-
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
